title: Set up Firebase Firestore in a Next.js project
summary: Install the Firebase v10 modular SDK, configure Firestore, implement typed CRUD helpers, real-time listeners, and set Security Rules.
declaration: I will set up Cloud Firestore using the Firebase v10 modular SDK in this Next.js project. Firestore is a real-time NoSQL document database. I will configure server-side access via Firebase Admin SDK (for API routes and Server Components) and client-side access for real-time listeners. If you are adding Firebase Auth alongside Firestore, say so — I will wire them together. If you need Firebase Realtime Database (not Firestore), say so before I begin.
